characters.name: Adam
characters.meaning: man, mankind; the first human created by God.

characters.name: Eve
characters.meaning: life-giver; the mother of all living.

characters.name: Noah
characters.meaning: rest or comfort; righteous man preserved through the flood.

characters.name: Abraham
characters.meaning: father of a multitude; patriarch of the covenant people.

characters.name: Sarah
characters.meaning: princess; wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac.

characters.name: Isaac
characters.meaning: he laughs; son of Abraham through whom the covenant continues.

characters.name: Jacob
characters.meaning: heel holder; later named Israel, father of the twelve tribes.

characters.name: Moses
characters.meaning: drawn out; prophet who delivered Israel and gave the law.

characters.name: Aaron
characters.meaning: exalted one; brother of Moses and first high priest of Israel.

characters.name: Joshua
characters.meaning: Yahweh is salvation; successor of Moses who led Israel into Canaan.

characters.name: Deborah
characters.meaning: bee; prophetess and judge who led Israel to victory.

characters.name: Gideon
characters.meaning: hewer; judge who defeated Midian with a small army.

characters.name: Samson
characters.meaning: sun-like; judge known for supernatural strength.

characters.name: Ruth
characters.meaning: friend; Moabite woman who became ancestor of David.

characters.name: Samuel
characters.meaning: heard of God; prophet who anointed Israel's first kings.

characters.name: Saul
characters.meaning: asked for; the first king of Israel.

characters.name: David
characters.meaning: beloved; king of Israel and ancestor of Messiah.

characters.name: Solomon
characters.meaning: peaceful; king known for wisdom who built the temple.

characters.name: Elijah
characters.meaning: my God is Yahweh; prophet who opposed Baal worship.

characters.name: Elisha
characters.meaning: God is salvation; successor to Elijah performing many miracles.

characters.name: Isaiah
characters.meaning: Yahweh saves; prophet who foretold the coming Messiah.

characters.name: Jeremiah
characters.meaning: Yahweh will raise up; prophet who warned Judah before exile.

characters.name: Ezekiel
characters.meaning: God strengthens; prophet of visions during exile.

characters.name: Daniel
characters.meaning: God is my judge; prophet known for visions and faith in Babylon.

characters.name: Hosea
characters.meaning: salvation; prophet whose life illustrated God's faithful love for Israel.

characters.name: Joel
characters.meaning: Yahweh is God; prophet who foretold the outpouring of the Spirit.

characters.name: Amos
characters.meaning: burden bearer; prophet who proclaimed God's justice.

characters.name: Obadiah
characters.meaning: servant of Yahweh; prophet declaring judgment on Edom.

characters.name: Jonah
characters.meaning: dove; prophet sent to preach repentance to Nineveh.

characters.name: Micah
characters.meaning: who is like Yahweh; prophet proclaiming justice and mercy.

characters.name: Nahum
characters.meaning: comfort; prophet declaring Nineveh's destruction.

characters.name: Habakkuk
characters.meaning: embrace; prophet who wrestled with God's justice.

characters.name: Zephaniah
characters.meaning: Yahweh hides; prophet warning of coming judgment.

characters.name: Haggai
characters.meaning: festive; prophet urging the rebuilding of the temple.

characters.name: Zechariah
characters.meaning: Yahweh remembers; prophet of visions and future restoration.

characters.name: Malachi
characters.meaning: my messenger; prophet announcing the coming messenger of the Lord.

characters.name: Mary
characters.meaning: Mary; the woman chosen to bear Jesus the Messiah.

characters.name: Joseph of Nazareth
characters.meaning: Joseph; earthly guardian of Jesus and husband of Mary.

characters.name: John the Baptist
characters.meaning: John; prophet preparing the way for the Messiah.

characters.name: Jesus
characters.meaning: Yahweh saves; the Son of God and Savior of the world.

characters.name: Peter
characters.meaning: rock; leading apostle among the disciples.

characters.name: Andrew
characters.meaning: manly; disciple who first followed Jesus and brought others.

characters.name: James son of Zebedee
characters.meaning: James; one of the twelve apostles and early martyr.

characters.name: John
characters.meaning: John; apostle and author of the Gospel and Revelation.

characters.name: Philip
characters.meaning: lover of horses; apostle and later evangelist.

characters.name: Bartholomew
characters.meaning: son of Tolmai; one of the twelve apostles.

characters.name: Matthew
characters.meaning: gift of God; tax collector turned apostle and gospel writer.

characters.name: Thomas
characters.meaning: twin; apostle known for doubting before believing.

characters.name: James son of Alphaeus
characters.meaning: James; one of the twelve disciples of Jesus.

characters.name: Thaddaeus
characters.meaning: Thaddaeus; one of the twelve apostles of Jesus.

characters.name: Simon the Zealot
characters.meaning: Simon; disciple known for zeal.

characters.name: Judas Iscariot
characters.meaning: Judas; disciple who betrayed Jesus.

characters.name: Mary Magdalene
characters.meaning: woman from Magdala who witnessed Jesus' resurrection.

characters.name: Lazarus
characters.meaning: man raised from the dead by Jesus.

characters.name: Martha
characters.meaning: sister of Lazarus known for service.

characters.name: Caiaphas
characters.meaning: Jewish high priest involved in Jesus' trial.

characters.name: Pontius Pilate
characters.meaning: Roman governor who authorized the crucifixion of Jesus.

characters.name: Barnabas
characters.meaning: son of encouragement; missionary companion of Paul.

characters.name: Stephen
characters.meaning: crown; first Christian martyr.

characters.name: Philip the Evangelist
characters.meaning: early evangelist who preached in Samaria.

characters.name: Paul
characters.meaning: Paul; missionary apostle to the Gentiles.

characters.name: Ananias of Damascus
characters.meaning: disciple who baptized Saul after his conversion.

characters.name: Timothy
characters.meaning: honoring God; companion and disciple of Paul.

characters.name: Titus
characters.meaning: trusted coworker of Paul and church leader.

characters.name: Luke
characters.meaning: physician and author of Luke and Acts.

characters.name: Mark
characters.meaning: John Mark; companion of Peter and gospel author.

characters.name: Silas
characters.meaning: early Christian leader and missionary partner of Paul.

characters.name: Apollos
characters.meaning: learned preacher who powerfully taught the scriptures.

characters.name: Priscilla
characters.meaning: early Christian teacher who helped instruct Apollos.

characters.name: Aquila
characters.meaning: husband of Priscilla and missionary coworker.

characters.name: Philemon
characters.meaning: Christian leader addressed in Paul's letter about forgiveness.

characters.name: Onesimus
characters.meaning: runaway servant who became a Christian.

characters.name: James
characters.meaning: brother of Jesus and leader in the Jerusalem church.

characters.name: Jude
characters.meaning: brother of James who wrote the epistle of Jude.

characters.name: Nicodemus
characters.meaning: Pharisee who came to Jesus by night seeking truth.

characters.name: Joseph of Arimathea
characters.meaning: member of the council who buried Jesus.

characters.name: Gamaliel
characters.meaning: respected Pharisee and teacher of the law.

characters.name: Cornelius
characters.meaning: Roman centurion who became one of the first Gentile believers.

characters.name: Lydia
characters.meaning: seller of purple cloth who believed the gospel.

characters.name: Festus
characters.meaning: Roman governor who heard Paul's case.

characters.name: Herod the Great
characters.meaning: king who ruled Judea during Jesus' birth.

characters.name: Herod Antipas
characters.meaning: ruler who executed John the Baptist.

characters.name: Herod Agrippa I
characters.meaning: king who persecuted the early church.

characters.name: Herod Agrippa II
characters.meaning: king who heard Paul's defense.

characters.name: Herodias
characters.meaning: wife of Herod who demanded John the Baptist's death.

characters.name: Crispus
characters.meaning: leader of the synagogue who believed in Christ.

characters.name: Sosthenes
characters.meaning: synagogue ruler who later joined the Christian community.

characters.name: Tychicus
characters.meaning: trusted companion who delivered Paul's letters.

characters.name: Epaphroditus
characters.meaning: messenger who served Paul and nearly died in ministry.

characters.name: Epaphras
characters.meaning: church leader devoted to prayer.

characters.name: Demas
characters.meaning: coworker of Paul who later abandoned the mission.

characters.name: Alexander the Coppersmith
characters.meaning: man who opposed Paul's ministry.

characters.name: The Ethiopian Eunuch
characters.meaning: royal official baptized by Philip.

characters.name: Ananias (High Priest)
characters.meaning: high priest who accused Paul.

characters.name: Caesar Augustus
characters.meaning: Roman emperor ruling during Jesus' birth.

characters.name: Claudius
characters.meaning: Roman emperor mentioned in Acts.

characters.name: Felix
characters.meaning: governor who kept Paul imprisoned.

characters.name: Drusilla
characters.meaning: wife of Felix who heard Paul's teaching.

characters.name: John (Revelation)
characters.meaning: apostle who received the visions recorded in Revelation.

characters.name: Abel
characters.meaning: son of Adam whose acceptable sacrifice pleased God

characters.name: Cain
characters.meaning: firstborn son of Adam who killed his brother Abel

characters.name: Seth
characters.meaning: son given to Adam and Eve after Abel's death

characters.name: Enoch
characters.meaning: man who walked with God and was taken by Him

characters.name: Lamech
characters.meaning: father of Noah who foretold comfort through him

characters.name: Lot
characters.meaning: nephew of Abraham rescued from Sodom

characters.name: Hagar
characters.meaning: servant of Sarah and mother of Ishmael

characters.name: Ishmael
characters.meaning: son of Abraham and Hagar

characters.name: Rebekah
characters.meaning: wife of Isaac and mother of Jacob and Esau

characters.name: Esau
characters.meaning: son of Isaac who became father of Edom

characters.name: Leah
characters.meaning: wife of Jacob and mother of six tribes

characters.name: Rachel
characters.meaning: wife of Jacob and mother of Joseph and Benjamin

characters.name: Judah
characters.meaning: son of Jacob whose tribe produced kings

characters.name: Tamar
characters.meaning: woman through whom Judah's lineage continued

characters.name: Potiphar
characters.meaning: Egyptian official who owned Joseph as servant

characters.name: Asenath
characters.meaning: Egyptian wife of Joseph

characters.name: Ephraim
characters.meaning: son of Joseph who became a tribe of Israel

characters.name: Manasseh
characters.meaning: firstborn son of Joseph

characters.name: Miriam
characters.meaning: sister of Moses and Aaron who led worship

characters.name: Zipporah
characters.meaning: wife of Moses and daughter of Jethro

characters.name: Jethro
characters.meaning: priest of Midian and father-in-law of Moses

characters.name: Korah
characters.meaning: Levite who led rebellion against Moses

characters.name: Balaam
characters.meaning: diviner hired to curse Israel

characters.name: Balak
characters.meaning: king who hired Balaam to curse Israel

characters.name: Phinehas
characters.meaning: priest known for zeal for God's holiness

characters.name: Bezalel
characters.meaning: artisan who built the tabernacle

characters.name: Oholiab
characters.meaning: assistant artisan of the tabernacle

characters.name: Barak
characters.meaning: military leader under Deborah

characters.name: Jael
characters.meaning: woman who defeated Sisera

characters.name: Abimelech
characters.meaning: son of Gideon who seized power

characters.name: Jephthah
characters.meaning: judge who delivered Israel from Ammon

characters.name: Delilah
characters.meaning: woman who betrayed Samson

characters.name: Jonathan
characters.meaning: son of Saul and loyal friend of David

characters.name: Michal
characters.meaning: daughter of Saul and wife of David

characters.name: Abigail
characters.meaning: wife of David known for wisdom

characters.name: Bathsheba
characters.meaning: wife of David and mother of Solomon

characters.name: Nathan
characters.meaning: prophet who rebuked David

characters.name: Joab
characters.meaning: military commander of David

characters.name: Absalom
characters.meaning: son of David who rebelled

characters.name: Ahab
characters.meaning: king of Israel who promoted idolatry

characters.name: Jezebel
characters.meaning: queen who promoted Baal worship

characters.name: Hezekiah
characters.meaning: king who restored worship

characters.name: Josiah
characters.meaning: king who restored the law

characters.name: Shadrach
characters.meaning: Hebrew exile delivered from the furnace

characters.name: Meshach
characters.meaning: companion of Daniel faithful to God

characters.name: Abednego
characters.meaning: servant of God delivered from the furnace

characters.name: Ezra
characters.meaning: priest who restored the law after exile

characters.name: Nehemiah
characters.meaning: leader who rebuilt Jerusalem's walls

characters.name: Esther
characters.meaning: queen who saved the Jewish people

characters.name: Mordecai
characters.meaning: cousin and protector of Esther

characters.name: Haman
characters.meaning: enemy of the Jews in Persia
